results.rendered_html:
revatī
1 N. of the 27th constellation which contains thirty-two stars.
2 N. of the wife of Balarāma;  Śi. 2. 16. 
3 A cow.
Comp.
— bhavaḥ the planet Saturn.
— ramaṇaḥ N. of Balarāma.
